content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.working_memory
FILE: cosmos/memory/working_memory.py (649 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Working Memory - In-Context Scratchpad

Novel Approaches:
1. Structured Scratchpad - Type-safe slots for different data types
2. Temporal Decay - Automatic relevance decay over time
3. Cross-Reference Tracking - Automatic linking between related items
4. Snapshot/Restore - Point-in-time memor

CLASSES:
- BudgetStatus: Token and cost budget status for working memory.
  Methods: def is_over_budget(self) -> bool
- SlotType(Enum): Types of working memory slots.
- WorkingMemorySlot: A typed slot in working memory.
  Methods: def is_expired(self) -> bool
  Methods: def get_age_seconds(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'WorkingMemorySlot'
- MemorySnapshot: Point-in-time snapshot of working memory.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- WorkingMemory: In-context scratchpad for active task processing.

Provides structured storage f
  Methods: async def set(self, name: str, content: Any, slot_type: SlotType=SlotType.SCRATCH, importance: float
  Methods: async def get(self, name: str, default: Any=None) -> Any
  Methods: async def get_slot(self, name: str) -> Optional[WorkingMemorySlot]
  Methods: async def delete(self, name: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def clear(self, slot_type: Optional[SlotType]=None)
  Methods: async def snapshot(self, metadata: Optional[dict]=None) -> MemorySnapshot
  Methods: async def restore(self, snapshot: MemorySnapshot)
  Methods: async def get_related(self, name: str, depth: int=1) -> list[WorkingMemorySlot]
